creator: wes@softweyr.com
text:
"David W. Chapman Jr." wrote:
> 
> Have you messaged the maintainer about this, most likely if he's not
> going to do it, nobody else is, so you might want to update it
> yourself and create a diff.

Thank you, I'll do that now.  If nothing else, I can point him at the
PR and ask if he would like to do it, or should I?  I wrote a similar,
but much more primitive tool myself a few years ago in response to a
request for a tool like this.  It is in sysutils/obliterate if you 
have any interest in these things.  ;^)

-- 
            "Where am I, and what am I doing in this handbasket?"
